use_cases: Displaying metric change indicators with directional arrows for analytics dashboards
Showing increase/decrease/neutral status for financial or business metrics
Indicating trend direction for data cards in SaaS applications
Providing visual feedback for comparative values in reporting tools
Serving as status badges in e-commerce inventory or sales reports
ai_summary: A badge component for displaying directional metric changes with up/down/neutral arrow indicators. Supports multiple variants (outline, solid, solid-outline, complex) with color-coded states for increase (emerald), decrease (red), and neutral (gray) changes. Built on Tremor design system with Remix icon integration for consistent arrow styling.
